data.title: Select Medical to open a 12-bed neuro transitional center in Harrisburg, PA, the first of its kind in the area.
data.description: In Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania on February 19, 2026, Select Medical Corporation revealed its plans to establish a 12-bed rehabilitative neuro transitional center (NTC) at 3705 Elmwood Drive in Harrisburg, PA 17110. This center will be the first of its kind in the area.

data.title: Jacob Molloy overcame severe dyslexia by using science-of-reading instruction, wrote debut chapter book, and surpassed grade-level decoding at age 10.
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on February 19, 2026, a remarkable student named Jacob Molloy defied expectations by achieving grade-level decoding skills and writing his first chapter book without the need for accommodations or assistive technology. At age 10, Jacob was unable to read due to severe dyslexia, but after receiving speech-to-print intervention, he has successfully surpassed grade-level reading abilities. This inspiring accomplishment showcases Jacob's determination and the effectiveness of the intervention, highlighting a significant milestone in his educational journey.

data.title: 90% of healthcare orgs feel need to modernize systems due to fragmentation risks, per CHIME survey.
data.description: A recent national study carried out in collaboration with RLDatix indicates that close to 90% of healthcare institutions recognize a pressing necessity to update their governance and interconnected systems. According to healthcare technology experts, the prevalence of disjointed systems and fragmented data landscapes pose significant challenges within the industry. The study findings were unveiled in Chicago on February 19, 2026.

data.title: 2026 AFP FP&A Forum showcases finance's role in AI enablement- Highlights AI-augmented workflows to boost expertise.
data.description: In Rockville, Maryland on February 19, 2026, practitioner-led sessions showcased a trend towards AI-aided workflows improving financial expertise. The growing presence of artificial intelligence is prompting financial leaders to find a balance between innovation and accuracy, as well as speed and reliability. The discussions emphasized the need to adapt to AI technologies in order to enhance financial capabilities.

data.title: Appeals court overturns conviction due to Judge Kaplan's improper evidence blockage, affecting Bankman-Fried's case dramatically.
data.description: Sam Bankman-Fried recently revealed that an appeals court overturned a conviction due to Judge Lewis Kaplan's incorrect blocking of evidence. Judge Kaplan, who sentenced Bankman-Fried to 25 years and oversaw Trump's E. Jean Carroll case, faced criticism for not allowing evidence of intent in a separate case. The Second Circuit Appeals Court deemed this exclusion as wrongful, leading to the dismissal of several counts and a remand for further proceedings. Bankman-Fried pointed out that Kaplan constantly restricted his testimony and excluded various forms of evidence as requested by the government. Bankman-Fried's pending Second Circuit appeal centers on the argument that the exclusion of intent evidence violated his right to a fair trial. The evidence that was excluded includes approval of entities and bank accounts used by FTX, as well as involvement of lawyers in drafting... (full story available elsewhere).
